name: Dayton
author: PSWBSF
description: Map of Dayton, OH. Extends down to where the default Cincinnati map ends. Demand is modeled for Dayton International Airport. Colleges include Sinclair Community College, University of Dayton, and Wright State University. Tourist demand is modeled for the National Museum of the US Air Force, Carillon Historical Park, Boonshoft Museum of Discovery, Dayton Art Institute, and the University of Dayton Arena and Welcome Stadium (combined into one data point).
